Fresh Mint Dental Floss for Teeth and Gum Oral Care Remove Food and Plaque 12pk

Fresh Mint Oral Care Dental Floss: an oral care essential and one of the must-have teeth cleaning tools!

Yes, we all know that dental floss should be a part of our daily teeth cleaning and teeth whitening routine. Using fresh mint floss regularly helps with the removal of food particles and bacteria in between our teeth, where regular oral care tools like toothpaste, mouthwash or a toothbrush cannot reach.

Key Features

  • DENTAL FLOSS: An oral health essential, dental floss should be a part of your daily teeth cleaning and teeth whitening routine; the use of floss regularly helps to remove food particles and bacteria in between your teeth where our other oral health tools like a toothbrush, toothpaste or mouthwash can’t reach
  • ORAL CARE TOOL: Made from nylon with a light coating of wax, this floss is easy to use, hold and maneuver between your teeth in order to remove unwanted food and bacteria from your mouth
  • ESSENTIAL GUM HEALTH: Dental floss helps to prevent the build of plaque and later tartar just below the gum line, therefore decreasing your chance of developing any general tooth decay, gingivitis or gum disease, as well as helping to maintain a healthy heart
  • FRESH MINT FLAVOR: This dental floss will help to keep your teeth and mouth feeling clean and your breath fresh with the refreshing and not too powerful ‘Freshmint’ flavor
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Pack: Three; Length: 54.68 yards each; Color: White; Case: plastic; Material: nylon

Product Specifications

  • MPN: HEFMDT12PK
  • UPC: 885189918618
  • Color: White
  • Size: Small

Gently stimulating and helping to maintain the gum line, regular use of fresh mint dental floss will prevent the acid build-up that leads to cavities, tooth decay, gingivitis, gum disease and has been proven in the maintenance of a healthy heart and heart disease prevention.

Made from nylon and covered with a light coating of wax, this dental floss is easy to use, grip and maneuver between your teeth in order to remove unwanted food and bacteria from your mouth. The floss also features a not-too-powerful fresh mint flavor, helping to keep your teeth and mouth feeling clean and your breath fresh!

As far as teeth whitening is concerned, using dental floss does not necessarily make your teeth more white from acrid food or stains caused by beverages like coffee or wine BUT, it does help keep your teeth from yellowing through the constant removal of food particles and unwanted bacteria that ultimately leads to plaque and tartar buildup. A must-have in your arsenal of oral care tools, add Fresh Mint Dental Floss to your everyday routine for healthy, white and happy teeth and gums!
